race.comment: HOLLER NUFF (4) made it back-to-back wins last start, highlighting himself as a gelding on the rise with a 0.9L victory over the mile. Out in trip again now for CJP, but the way he finished off last time suggests it's not an issue. This shapes similarly and he can bring up the hat-trick. PRECIOUS GOD (8) won narrowly two back before beaten in a photo finish over the mile here most recently. She steps out in trip for the first time, though it looks to suit on how she's racing in her recent efforts. Drawn nicely and can make an impression once again. BIRD'S THE WORD (2) beat a smart one two back before closing well here most recently, beaten 0.7L. Drawn better this time for Parnham and he can sit closer in the run this time. Can feature in the finish again. I DREAMED A DREAM (5) has gone under narrowly his past couple and won't be far away. MISTRESS OF WAR (10) has to be included on her recent form.
